docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RAVALLI, ROBIANN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAVALLI, ROBIANN A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAVALLI, ROBIANN A. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY FILING BY ATTORNEY ON BEHALF OF ROBI-ANN RAVALLI FILED.
DISMISSAL NOT ACCEPTEDBY SYSTEM"JUDGMENT ON FILE".
